channel.title: Bob's Morning Brief
channel.description: A daily 15–20 minute geopolitics, economy, AI, and arts brief. Auto-generated each weekday morning at 06:08 ET from a curated set of sources, then narrated by Apple's neural TTS. Built for the commute.
channel.itunes:author: Axion

item.title: Morning Brief — Wed 13 May 2026
item.description: Good morning. Trump arrived in Beijing on May 13 with Pete Hegseth on the plane and an unfinished war with Iran in his pocket. Both sides believe economic pain will break the other first, and a long deadlock looms. The summit will run two days. Hegseth's presence on the flight contradicts the stated position. If the Iran war were settled, the war secretary stays home.
item.itunes:author: Axion
